goal: Visit this page, take a screenshot, and rate the design out of 10. Note: this is a dark-themed SaaS dashboard for blockchain services. Focus on: visual hierarchy, card consistency, font readability, spacing, empty-state quality. Give a score and list 3 concrete improvements.

action.criteria: Rate this dark-themed SaaS blockchain dashboard out of 10. Focus on: visual hierarchy (is important content prominent?), card consistency (do cards follow same style/spacing?), font readability (contrast, size, weight), spacing (margins, padding, whitespace), empty-state quality (are placeholders helpful?). Provide a score and identify 3 concrete improvements.

steps.expectedEffect: Will receive a design evaluation with a score out of 10 and specific improvement recommendations for this blockchain SaaS dashboard
